allowed: Visibility and reappearance are separate FutureSemanticTraceState predictions.
Reappearance training can start only after independent future_reappearance_logit export/eval smoke passes.
Random-init reappearance AUROC/AP can be logged as smoke diagnostics, not model ability.
forbidden: Claiming calibrated reappearance from visibility probability.
Training reappearance loss on the same logit as visibility loss.
Proceeding to large training before reappearance-head smoke passes.
Interpreting random-init reappearance metrics as learned reappearance ability.
this_round_status: independent reappearance head/export/eval smoke passed; no capability claim yet
